gap: The legacy dialect is read only from the flat gen_ai.prompt / gen_ai.completion keys. OpenLLMetry/Traceloop instrumentors (the dominant emitters of this dialect) flatten per message instead — gen_ai.prompt.{i}.role / .content and gen_ai.completion.{i}.content — so the whole conversation is dropped and the run stores an empty prompt AND an empty answer, exactly the class of blank-payload bug #178 fixed for the OpenInference indexed form.
note: This fixture asserts the mapping we WANT, under xfail: the same index reconstruction that already exists for llm.{input,output}_messages.{i}, applied to gen_ai.{prompt,completion}.{i}.
